**STRICT UI RULES**:

NEVER use hardcoded Tailwind colors like 'bg-slate-xxx', 'bg-zinc-xxx', or 'bg-black'.

ONLY use the CSS variables defined in globals.css (e.g., use 'bg-background', 'bg-card', 'border-border').

The main background must be EXACTLY #000000 (Pure Black).
secondary/card/popover/input elements must use #0f0f0f (Dark Gray).
Text and Buttons must be #ffffff (Pure White) where applicable for contrast.

Use the following accent colors:
- Blue/Primary: #328ea6
- Green/Success: #24a693
- Red/Destructive: #f23645

Ensure all borders use 'border-border' (#2a2e39) and are very subtle (0.5px or 1px).

Do not use gradients on cards unless I specifically ask. Keep it flat and premium.
